The '''Erhynradd Mutiny''' was a conflict that took place in [[5 BBY/Legends|5 BBY]]<ref name="CSWE" /> in the vicinity of<ref name="Battlenamia" /> the [[Inner Rim/Legends|Inner Rim's]] [[Erhynradd system/Legends|Erhynradd system]].<ref name="TEA">''[[The Essential Atlas]]''</ref> It saw the [[Death/Legends|death]] of [[Brigadier]] [[Gideon Tarkin]] of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]].<ref name="CRO" /> When Tarkin's [[Gender/Legends|brother]], Imperial [[Grand Moff/Legends|Grand Moff]] [[Wilhuff Tarkin/Legends|Wilhuff Tarkin]], received news of Gideon's death, he accepted the brigadier's<ref name="NEGTC">''[[The New Essential Guide to Characters]]''</ref> teenage<ref name="CRO" /> daughter, [[Rivoche Tarkin|Rivoche]], into his family estate on<ref name="NEGTC" /> the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories']] [[Planet/Legends|planet]]<ref name="TEA" /> [[Eriadu/Legends|Eriadu]]. Resentful at the loss of her [[Parent/Legends|father]], Rivoche frequently threw tantrums. That ended when Wilhuff had a friendly servant girl and her family [[Prisoner/Legends|imprisoned]] on a [[Prison/Legends|penal]] [[Asteroid/Legends|asteroid]], after which his niece began to conceal her true feelings.<ref name="CRO" />

==Behind the scenes==
The Erhynradd Mutiny was created by [[Michael Allen Horne]] and was introduced in ''[[Cracken's Rebel Operatives]]'', a [[1994]] [[West End Games]] sourcebook published for use with ''[[Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game]]''.<ref name="CRO" />
